use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT OF HEART FAILURE

indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Heart Failure in Self-identified Black Patients
BiDil is indicated for the treatment of heart failure as an adjunct to standard therapy in self-identified black patients to improve
survival, to prolong time to hospitalization for heart failure, and to improve patient-reported functi...
